name: ArrayTools
shortDescription: Array utilities: search, sort, shuffle, slice, concat, reverse, pop, random element access.

eventsFunctions.name: IndexOf
eventsFunctions.description: Compare The index of the first variable that equals to a specific number in an array.

eventsFunctions.name: IndexOfStr
eventsFunctions.description: Compare The index of the first variable that equals to a specific text in an array.

eventsFunctions.name: LastIndexOf
eventsFunctions.description: Compare The index of the last variable that equals to a specific number in an array.

eventsFunctions.name: LastIndexOfStr
eventsFunctions.description: Compare The index of the last variable that equals to a specific text in an array.

eventsFunctions.name: RandomNumberInArray
eventsFunctions.description: Compare Returns a random number of an array of numbers.

eventsFunctions.name: RandomStringInArray
eventsFunctions.description: Compare a random string of an array of strings.

eventsFunctions.name: PopNumber
eventsFunctions.fullName: Get and remove last variable from array (as number)
eventsFunctions.description: Compare Removes the last array child of an array, and return it as a number.

eventsFunctions.name: PopString
eventsFunctions.description: Removes the last array child of an array, and return it as a string.

eventsFunctions.name: ShiftNumber
eventsFunctions.description: Removes the first array child of an array, and return it as a number.

eventsFunctions.name: ShiftString
eventsFunctions.description: Removes the first array child of an array, and return it as a string.

eventsFunctions.name: HasNumber
eventsFunctions.description: Checks if an array contains a specific number.

eventsFunctions.name: HasString
eventsFunctions.description: Checks if an array contains a specific string.

eventsFunctions.name: Slice
eventsFunctions.description: Copies a portion of a scene array variable into a new scene array variable.

eventsFunctions.name: Splice
eventsFunctions.description: Cuts a portion of an array off.

eventsFunctions.name: Concatenate
eventsFunctions.description: Combines all elements of 2 scene arrays into one new scene array.

eventsFunctions.name: AppendAll
eventsFunctions.fullName: Append all variable to another array
eventsFunctions.description: Appends a copy of all variables of one array to another array.

eventsFunctions.name: Reverse
eventsFunctions.description: Reverses children of an array. The first array child becomes the last, and the last array child becomes the first.

eventsFunctions.name: FillNumber
eventsFunctions.description: Fill an element with a number.

eventsFunctions.name: Shuffle
eventsFunctions.description: Shuffles all children of an array.

eventsFunctions.name: Flatten
eventsFunctions.description: Replaces all arrays inside of an array with their children. For example, [[1,2], [3,4]] becomes [1,2,3,4].

eventsFunctions.name: Pop
eventsFunctions.description: Removes the last array child of an array, and stores it in another variable.

eventsFunctions.name: Shift
eventsFunctions.description: Removes the first array child of an array, and stores it in another variable.

eventsFunctions.name: InsertAt
eventsFunctions.description: Insert a variable at a specific index of an array.

eventsFunctions.name: SplitString
eventsFunctions.description: Split a string into an array of strings via a separator.

eventsFunctions.name: Join
eventsFunctions.fullName: Join all elements of an array together into a string
eventsFunctions.description: Returns a string made from all strings in an array.

eventsFunctions.name: Sum
eventsFunctions.description: Get the sum of all numbers in an array.

eventsFunctions.name: Min
eventsFunctions.description: Gets the smallest number in an array.

eventsFunctions.name: Max
eventsFunctions.description: Gets the biggest number in an array.

eventsFunctions.name: Mean
eventsFunctions.description: Gets the average number in an array.

eventsFunctions.name: Median
eventsFunctions.description: Gets the median number in an array.

eventsFunctions.name: Sort
eventsFunctions.description: Sort an array of number from smallest to biggest.

eventsFunctions.description: Compare The index of the first variable that equals to a specific number in an array.

eventsFunctions.name: ObjectIndexOfStr
eventsFunctions.description: Compare The index of the first variable that equals to a specific text in an array.

eventsFunctions.description: Replaces all arrays inside of an array with their children. For example, [[1,2], [3,4]] becomes [1,2,3,4].

description:
This extension adds features like:
- Combining arrays (concatenate into new array, append all children to another array)
- Finding a value in an array (find index expression, contains condition)
- Reversing arrays
- Get a portion of an array (slice)
- Add and remove lots of children at specific indices at once (fill, splice, shift, pop, add at index)
- Randomness (shuffle children, get a random child)
- Mathematical operations using arrays (sum of all numbers, biggest/smallest number, average number, median number)
- Sort numbers in an array
- String inter-operation (split string into array, join array array children to string)
